text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm out with Matikanetannhauser, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Bourbon and Rice. Hey there!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hello, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, hello... What a coincidence. Are you two
going somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yup, gotta take breaks sometimes. What are you
two up to?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well... Bourbon won these special Bubble Land
tickets, and she wanted me to go with her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mission number one, "Win a Prize," is complete.
I'm currently executing mission number two,
"Bring Rice to Bubble Land."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you... You're so kind.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Expression of gratitude confirmed. Searching for
appropriate response... You're welcome.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-anyway! See you later, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, those two are such great friends. That sure
sounds like a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't we also go to Bubble Land? I
mean, the two of us are great friends too, right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Great! Then, it's off to Bubble Land! Let's go, go,
go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there are so many people here. And yet...
And yet...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I forgot my swimsuit! Ughhh, my bubbly dreams
have been popped!
choice_data_list: Want me to go buy you one?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Not only did you get me a swimsuit, you bought
me this flappy fan too?! Thank you so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! ♪ This is the bubbly best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's almost time for the parade... I really,
really want to see it, but... I danced so much that
now I'm sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mumble, mumble... Zzz...
choice_data_list: I'll go ahead and record the parade.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... wheeze... We finally made it! This waterslide sure is high!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But all that hard work is about to pay off on the
way d—oh... My nose feels funny...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me I'm getting a nosebleed!
choice_data_list: Let's go back down and take a break!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My frenetic day with Matikanetannhauser
practically flies by.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, man, Bubble Land is so much fun. I'm so
happy we came here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look over there!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching... Searching... I've confirmed that Rice
is approaching.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry for the wait! Um, uh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to give you this...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Body temperature and heart rate rising in
response to unforeseen event... Actually, I bought
you a drink as well.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Really? You didn't need to get anything for me...
B-but thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy that you've accepted it... Mission
complete.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'm happy too. Hehe, we're really on the
same page.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You can see how much they care about each
other... Yep, yep, that's some high-level respect.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I have to follow their lead and never forget to be
considerate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Oh. Come to think of it, you're always doing so
much for me, but I feel like I never give anything
back!
choice_data_list: You can thank me by doing great in your races!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I am worried! Our relationship should go both
ways!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's it, I'm gonna go buy you something tasty!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no! There are so many people... I-I'm being
swept away by the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Where are you taking me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rescue Matikanetannhauser from her
predicament, and we're both left thoroughly
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I can handle that! I'll win and stir up a storm!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... If I'm going to do that, we've also got to
raise the quality of my training. What should we
do?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And what kind of race should I run in? I'll
have to consider my schedule... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. You're just doing everything for me again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser seems at a loss as to how to
repay me for all the things I do for her.
